Group
October l, 1991
Ms. Kim Taylor
Analyst
428 J. Street, Suite 610
Sacramento, CA 958M
Dear Ms. Taylor:
Attached for your review and approval is a mock-up, unsigned copy
of the Pacific Telesis Group's mechanized Form 461 - Independent
Expenditure Committee and Major Donor Committee Campaign
Statement incorporating the new FPPC reporting requirements for the
January through June l99l reporting time frame.
Please note that we have included the column for Cumulative Amounts
to Date for Other to report cumulative contributions to candidates
running in state special and special run-off elections. As a state major
donor committee, we do not believe that reporting contributions to
local candidates and ballot measures under Cumulative Amounts to
Date for Other is required.
We look forward to your approval of our proposed form and
confirmation of our interpretation. Please call Anne lrong of my
staff at (415) 394-3067 if you have any questions.
Sincerely,
et
o-c
<n c)
-.D

sections.question_synthetic: Pacific Telesis Group is seeking FPPC approval of a mechanized Form 461 for Independent Expenditure Committee and Major Donor Committee Campaign Statement reporting, and confirmation that state major donor committees are not required to report contributions to local candidates and ballot measures under Cumulative Amounts to Date for Other.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request/transmittal letter from Pacific Telesis Group to FPPC analyst Kim Taylor, not an FPPC response letter. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections are present. Document appears to be a cover letter accompanying a proposed form for FPPC approval. Date is October 1, 1991.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: Pacific Telesis Group is seeking FPPC approval of a mechanized Form 461 for Independent Expenditure Committee and Major Donor Committee Campaign Statement reporting, and confirmation that state major donor committees are not required to report contributions to local candidates and ballot measures under Cumulative Amounts to Date for Other.
